review.notes: OCR also contains an adjacent-column article about a CFL quarterback trade (Paopao to Ottawa) and a fragment about a boxing title fight — both unrelated to the Sockeyes. The draft correctly focuses on the Sockeyes article. The series described here is the Abbott Cup (western final tier-two), not yet the Centennial Cup final, but the article itself uses the term "Centennial Cup junior hockey playoff game" and "tier-two western final," so the draft language faithfully reflects the source. No factual errors found.
